metadata.title: EU Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA, selected articles) → AppSec Core V1 (with ACR-001, ACR-002, ACR-004 incorporated) (Concept Crosswalk)
metadata.schema-basis: NIST IR 8477 relationship vocabulary + NIST IR 8278A r1 STRM resource model

source-document.title: EU Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA, selected articles)
source-document.author: European Union

reference-document.title: AppSec Core V1 (with ACR-001, ACR-002, ACR-004 incorporated)
reference-document.author: SbD-ToE Programme — AppSec Core ontology project

metadata.methodology: Threshold-based continuous→categorical translation: sim≥0.6 → equal; 0.4≤sim<0.6 → intersects-with; sim<0.4 → unspecified. Multi-claim per source-item: one row per (source-item, target-Core-entity) unique pair using highest-similarity claim for that target. is-primary="true" marks item overall highest-similarity claim's target. subset-of / superset-of NOT in first cut (cosine similarity lacks directional info; SME refinement future work). STRM resource model: pilot doc → DocumentaryImpl; source-item → ConcreteImpl; AppSec Core V1 → Reference Document; Core entity → Concept.

source-element.description: DORA Article 5. Article 5 (Governance and organisation) places ultimate responsibility for managing ICT risk on the management body of the financial entity. The management body shall define, approve,…

reference-element.description: Access Abuse Monitoring And Audit Trail. Make rejected access, abuse signals and externally visible calls auditable and operationally reviewable. rollout recovery and runtime records. audit

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.517; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_DORA-CLAIM-000007 at Practice level. Primary anchor (item highest-similarity claim).

reference-element.description: Critical Security Event Coverage And Catalog Discipline. Security-relevant events must be explicitly cataloged and actually emitted so that the audit trail covers material security activity. Critical…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.443; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_DORA-CLAIM-000006 at ControlObjective level. Secondary disclosure.

reference-element.description: Progressive Rollout And Containment. Introduce high-impact change gradually and contain unsafe rollout without requiring immediate full rollback. rollout recovery and runtime records. controlled roll…

source-element.description: DORA Article 6. Article 6 (ICT risk-management framework) requires financial entities to have a sound, comprehensive and well-documented ICT risk-management framework as part of their overall risk-ma…

reference-element.description: Structured Threat Analysis Frameworks. Apply an explicit threat-analysis method with minimum coverage discipline appropriate to the risk context. governance and review. modeling framework

source-element.description: implement ICT security policies, procedures, protocols

reference-element.description: Transport And Protocol Hardening. Enforce secure transport, certificate hygiene and explicit protocol restrictions for integrations. identity and trust control. transport hardening
